params.value: SELECT OwnerId, ActivityDate, COUNT(Id) emailCount FROM Task WHERE TaskSubtype = 'Email' AND ActivityDate = LAST_N_DAYS:30 AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) GROUP BY OwnerId, ActivityDate ORDER BY OwnerId, ActivityDate LIMIT 2000
